linkedin_recommendations.fetch_status: LinkedIn public page returned HTTP 999 from this environment, so exact live text was not machine-readable. Recommendations below are aligned to the website entity story and should be applied manually against the actual profile.
linkedin_recommendations.headline: Michigan Ross MBA | Applied AI, Forecasting & Automation | Business Strategy + Commercial Operations | Building Decision Systems and Multi-Agent Workflows
linkedin_recommendations.about: I work at the intersection of Applied AI, Business Strategy, and Commercial Operations. My focus is turning forecasting, pricing, revenue planning, and workflow bottlenecks into practical AI-enabled decision systems. At Dell Technologies, I supported $16B+ in enterprise server revenue scope and built AI-enabled planning systems that improved forecast accuracy to 90%+. I also build multi-agent workflow systems and automation pipelines that reduce manual work and improve decision speed. I am focused on roles where AI systems, business performance, forecasting, automation, product strategy, and commercial operations intersect.
experience_bullets: Dell Technologies: emphasize Commercial Strategy, Planning and AI Analytics; $16B+ server revenue scope; 90%+ forecast accuracy; AI-enabled decision systems.
Use the same language as the website: Applied AI, Forecasting, Automation, Decision Systems, Business Performance.
Avoid generic consulting phrasing like “help companies transform with AI”; use concrete operating outcomes.
featured_section: Portfolio project: Multi-agent workflow system / Hermes + OpenClaw
Project: Automation systems and forecasting workflows

github_audit.recommended_profile_bio: Michigan Ross MBA building Applied AI, forecasting, automation, and decision systems for commercial operations and business performance.
repo_recommendations: Set GitHub profile name to Felipe Postigo Gonzalez for entity consistency.
Add felipepostigo.com to the GitHub website field.
Pin portfolio, multi-agent-orchestrator, finance intelligence/project repo if public, automation systems, and forecasting projects.
Add homepage/backlink to each priority repo.
Add topics: applied-ai, ai-agents, forecasting, automation, business-intelligence, commercial-operations, decision-systems.
Write README case studies around real outcomes, not generic demos.

google_search_console: Use DNS verification if possible; otherwise HTML file verification.
bing_webmaster_tools: Import verified Google Search Console property or verify manually.
Use URL Submission for homepage, who-is, about, press kit, resume, projects, llms files.

priority_profiles: Highest recruiter/entity impact. Add website URL, Featured website card, project links, same headshot, and same Applied AI / Business Strategy / Commercial Operations story.
High authority for AI systems. Add website URL, profile README, pinned repositories, repo descriptions, topics, and backlinks.
Highest search/indexing control. Verify property, submit sitemap, inspect priority URLs, request indexing.
Important for Bing Copilot and Microsoft ecosystem retrieval. Verify/import, submit sitemap, request indexing.
Useful if demos are public. Add website to channel and video descriptions.
Strong education/entity trust if available. Link back to FelipePostigo.com.
Good for article distribution and backlinks, but only if content is actually maintained.
Lower priority: Wellfound, Maven, Hugging Face, Kaggle, Crunchbase only if relevant and maintained.

article_concepts.title: What Forecasting Systems Need Before AI Makes Them Useful
article_concepts.angle: Use Dell-style revenue planning and 90%+ forecast accuracy as the anchor. Explain why decision context, operating cadence, and clear inputs matter more than model theater.

article_concepts.title: From Manual Workflows to Decision Systems: How Automation Actually Improves Business Performance
article_concepts.angle: Reference 120+ hours eliminated, workflow automation, and operating-system design. Focus on measurable process outcomes.

article_concepts.title: Applied AI for Commercial Operations: Where Strategy Meets Execution
article_concepts.angle: Connect business strategy, commercial operations, pricing, forecasting, and revenue operations. Emphasize practical systems.

article_concepts.title: What Multi-Agent Systems Teach About Business Operations
article_concepts.angle: Reference Hermes / OpenClaw and multi-agent workflow orchestration as a business operating system, not a hobby project.

article_concepts.title: Decision Intelligence Is the Missing Layer Between Analytics and Action
article_concepts.angle: Explain how BI dashboards, forecasting models, automation, and AI agents become useful only when tied to decisions and accountability.

strengths: Full name appears above the fold.
Person schema includes image, sameAs, alumniOf, knowsAbout, alternateName, and URL.
Press kit gives canonical bios and accomplishments.
llms files and resume.json support AI retrieval.
weaknesses: External backlinks are still thin until LinkedIn, GitHub, YouTube, Michigan Ross, and article links are updated.
Search/AI visibility will lag until Google/Bing index the deployed version.
expected_timeline: 0-24 hours: site available after deployment and cache purge.
1-3 days: Search Console/Bing submissions can show crawled/indexed status.
1-4 weeks: branded queries improve as external profiles and backlinks converge.
30-90 days: AI retrieval confidence improves with public articles and consistent profile links.

recommendation: Immediate deployment after approval; stop website development and shift to external authority building.
